channel.title: Tops on Sungura
channel.description: Recent content in Tops on Sungura

item.title: About me
item.description: Sandra Muñoz Revilla Hi! I’m a designer and animator from Madrid. I specialize in graphic design and interface, I also make animations and motion graphics. I also know how to handle myself with Wordpress at intermediate level. I was born in Madrid in 1995 and my hobbies are painting, video games, photography and sport. Have a look to my other websites: My Linkedin, where you can find my professional trajectory.

item.title: Contact
item.description: Contact me :) You can send me an email or fill this contact form.
